titleStmt.title: SII 17.193: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 193. (A.R. No. 172 of 1904.) TIRUVAKKARAI, VILUPPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.
This record commences with Pūmādu puṇara, etc., the praśasti of the king.
It mentions Arumbākkiḻān Araiyan of Maṇavil in Maṇavil-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅ goṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu makuḻaRead makiḻa.ceyamātu peruka tantiruppatuRead pata. malar manna
var cūṭa manniya Urimaiyil maṇimuṭicūṭic ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷaṟppa veṅkali
niṅka meyyaṟan taḻaippak kaliṅka miriyakkaṭarRead kaṭal.malai naṭātti valaṅkoḷḷāḻi varaiyā
tu naṭappaSome versions read varaiyāḻitiriya (of. SII. Vol. VIII-ṇo. 511).Irucuṭaraḷavu morukuṭainiḻaṟkiḻRead niḻaṟṟa (cf. ibid.)virasiṁhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷo
ṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻadevaṟku
yāṇṭu Aiñcāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇavil koṭṭattu maṇavil Arum
pākkiḻān Araiyan
tu māttuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.193 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
